title: André Sogliuzzo

'''André Sogliuzzo''' is an [[Wikipedia:United States|American]] voice actor who provided the voices of [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Captain Typho]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]], as well as the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], [[Fordo|Alpha-77]] and [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], for the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' cartoon. He also provided minor voicework for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', as well as the voices of clone troopers and [[Cydon Prax]] for [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''The Clone Wars'']].

He is credited for "Additional Voices" in ''[[Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars]]'', and worked on the [[LucasArts]] games [[Wikipedia:Gladius (video game)|''Gladius'']] and [[Wikipedia:Secret Weapons Over Normandy|''Secret Weapons Over Normandy'']].

He voiced [[Captain]] [[Slavin]] on ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' in the episodes [[Hera's Heroes]]<ref name="HH">{{Rebels|Hera's Heroes}}</ref> and [[In the Name of the Rebellion]]. He also voiced two [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[stormtrooper]]s in the latter episode.<ref name="INR">{{Rebels|In the Name of the Rebellion}}</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' – Additional Voices
